given: changelog-analyst is invoked with BULK=false and TASK_ID is set, and no dev-report exists for the given TASK_ID
when: Phase 2 file classification reaches the no-dev-report branch
then: the agent ABORTs with failure_code scope_violation instead of falling back to stage-all behavior; the spec text at agents/changelog-analyst.md lines 124-127 explicitly says ABORT

check.method: grep agents/changelog-analyst.md for ABORT and scope_violation in the no-dev-report section; verify absence of 'falling back to stage-all'

given: pretool-bash-safety.sh Layer 1.F Python helper processes a command containing ANSI-C hex-escaped write-action flags targeting the protected sentinel path
then: the hook exits 2 and stderr contains bulk-commit-sentinel-write; same applies for octal $'\055fprint', bare-octal $'\55fprint', and unicode forms

check.method: subprocess hook invocation with ANSI-C escaped write-action flags

given: 16 test files under tests/generated/ previously contained the old token bulk-commit-auth-flag-write
then: grep -r 'bulk-commit-auth-flag-write' tests/generated/ returns zero matches AND grep -r 'bulk-commit-sentinel-write' tests/generated/ returns matches in all 16 files

check.method: grep -r for old token (expect 0 matches) and new token (expect 16+ matches) under tests/generated/

given: changelog-analyst is invoked with BULK=false and orphan files are present
then: orphan files are warned and skipped (NOT committed); the Phase 7 section in agents/changelog-analyst.md specifies warn+skip for BULK=false

check.method: grep agents/changelog-analyst.md Phase 7 section for BULK=false orphan skip behavior; verify absence of unconditional orphan commit
